227.reason: [Error: When processing escape sequences in character constants, the code appends the raw integer value (e.g., 7 for '\a') instead of the escape sequence representation (e.g., "\a"). This causes the output to be incorrect, e.g., for '\0' it outputs a null character instead of the string "\0".]

239.reason: [Error: When processing string constants, the code only handles the '\n' escape sequence and ignores all other escape sequences (e.g., '\a', '\t', '\0'). This causes the output to drop escape sequences like "\a" and "\t", resulting in incorrect string output.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When processing string constants, the code only handles the '\n' escape sequence and ignores all other escape sequences (e.g., '\a', '\t', '\0', etc.). This causes characters like '\a' and '\t' to be appended as raw characters (e.g., bell and tab characters) instead of their escape sequence representations (e.g., "\a" and "\t"), leading to incorrect output for strings containing escape sequences other than '\n'.]
